capabilities.name: Payroll Processing & CPF Compliance
capabilities.description: Calculate monthly gross-to-net pay for every employee, applying Singapore statutory contributions (CPF employer + employee, SDL, FWL) and any custom deductions or allowances. The payroll engine is the legally sensitive core of HR — errors trigger IRAS and CPF Board audits.

capabilities.name: Data Security, Privacy & Consent
capabilities.description: Employee data is the most sensitive data an SME holds — NRIC, salary, medical, bank details. PDPA compliance, encryption, retention, and access audit are non-negotiable. PSG requires PDPA compliance, Cyber Essentials Mark, and VA/PT across every pre-approved vendor.

capabilities.name: User Accounts, Roles & Access Control
capabilities.description: HR systems have stronger role separation than any other ERP module — HR admin, payroll officer, line manager, employee, and finance each see a different slice of the same employee record. Fine-grained RBAC is mandatory, not optional.
